name: Beef Stew #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut vegetables into bite-sized pieces, mainly potatoes, carrots, onions, and celery.
2. Purchase the least expensive piece of beef or chicken and cut it into bite-sized pieces, removing most of the fat and marbling.
3. Place all ingredients in a crock pot with 1 can of Golden Cream of Mushroom Soup and 1 can of plain tomato soup. Add about half to one can of cold water.
4. Cook for 5-8 hours on slow or medium heat.
5. Seasonings may be added after the first cooking, such as pepper.
